title: Automations to create a group in a seperate board

posts.author: Koral (Koral)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im trying to work out how i setup an automation so when a status changes from one to another, create a new group in a seperate board with the name of the item that status changed.

Is this possible please?

I’ve managed to create one where, when status changes, create a new board from a template
